title: WISEUP Pliers Set, 170mm 4-Piece Bent/Straight Internal External Circlip Plier, Industrial Carbon Steel plier Set, Anti-Rust, Anti-Bending and Labor-Saving Split Ring Pliers, with Storage Bag
features: 【Basic dimension】 170mm (7-inch) Circlip Pliers, diameter of tong head 1.5mm, straight opening range 0-35mm, bending opening range 0-30mm

【High Quality Material】 The Pliers are made of # 55 industrial carbon steel, which has been quenched and heat treated, and is integrally shaped, with high hardness and toughness. The blackened surface forms an oxide film protection layer to prevent rust
【Ergonomics】 Matte adhesive plastic handle is anti-slip and sweat-proof, ergonomically designed, convenient to hold, durable and labor-saving
【Multi-purpose】 Circlip Pliers are widely used in mechanical maintenance, industrial maintenance, equipment maintenance, vehicle maintenance, household appliance maintenance and other occasions

【Service From WISEUP】WISEUP has been Founded for 20 Years Who is always Committed to Hardware Manual and Electric Tools,as well as Pneumatic Tools, Auto Repair, Decoration etc. Helping you with your home DIY remodeling as well as work needs
description: 170 mm (7 inch) snap ring pliers, head diameter 1.5 mm, straight opening range 0-35 mm, curved opening range 0-30 mm
